> **Note:** This research was generated using AI assistance (Claude + Parallel.ai) with human expert review. See [methodology](../docs/methodology.md) for details.

# Research Index — A Thriving and Sustainable Built Environment

**70 deep-research reports** generated by Parallel.ai (pro processor) from the prompt corpus in `05_prompts/research/`.
Each file is a markdown report with inline citations. Read this index first to identify which file to open.

---

## How to use this index

- **Start here** if you need to understand the problem space: Section A
- **Understand the users**: Section B
- **Find existing services and gaps**: Section C
- **Locate usable data**: Section D
- **Find comparable tools**: Section E
- **Identify solution opportunities**: Section F
- **Assess risks before building**: Section G
- **Plan the MVP**: Section H
- **Prepare the demo pitch**: Section I
- **Transparency theory / service-tracker depth**: Sections J–Q (after A–I for Richmond context)
- **Quick synthesis** (start here for speed): `90_top_10_research_questions.md`, `91_top_10_hypotheses_to_test.md`, `92_red_flags.md`

---

## Key External References
The research reports indexed above draw upon official city data sources, including the [City of Richmond Open Data Portal](https://data.richmondgov.com/) [1], which serves as a primary way for citizens to access, interpret, and interact with data about their city. Additional project and service data is sourced from the [RVA311 Citizen Portal](https://www.rva.gov/citizen-service-and-response/about-rva-311) [2] and the [Richmond Public Works Construction Projects](https://www.rva.gov/public-works/construction-projects-road-improvements) [3].

## References

1. *Open Data Portal | City of Richmond, Virginia | Open Data Portal ...*. https://data.richmondgov.com/
2. *About RVA 311 | Richmond*. https://www.rva.gov/citizen-service-and-response/about-rva-311
3. *Construction Projects & Road Improvements | Richmond - RVA.gov*. https://www.rva.gov/public-works/construction-projects-road-improvements
